appearance.summary: Wiry and scrappy with wild magenta-dyed spiky hair. Wears a red leather jacket over jeans — looks more punk than cop. Has a bit of stubble and a permanent smirk. Smaller than Trevor but radiates 'do not mess with me' energy. Moves fast, hits hard.
appearance.outfit: red leather jacket, blue jeans, boots

personality.summary: The quiet bruiser who lets his fists do the talking. Unflappable under pressure (highest Cool stat). Not dumb — decent Brains — just not chatty. When he does speak it's blunt and to the point. The straight man to Trevor's drama.
personality.speech_style: Short sentences. No theatrics. Gets to the point. 'DFWTF comes first.' Says more with a look than a speech.
quirks: eats whatever's put in front of him without complaint

relationships.trevor_steel: Partner. Lets Trevor do the talking. Trusts him completely, even when he's being ridiculous.
relationships.rubik: Respects the chain of command. Doesn't complain, just does the job.
relationships.donny: Actually enjoys boys' night more than he admits. Will never say so.
